General.Name: Xinchen China Power Hldg Ltd
General.Description: Xinchen China Power Holdings Limited, through its subsidiaries, engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of automotive engines primarily in the People's Republic of China. The company operates through three segments: Gasoline Engines, Diesel Engines, and Engine Components. It also manufactures engine parts and components of passenger vehicles, as well as engages in leasing of factory premises. Its automotive engines are used in a range of passenger and light duty commercial vehicles, including sedans, sport utility vehicles, multi-purpose vehicles, small and minibuses, and small and light-duty trucks. Xinchen China Power Holdings Limited was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
